title: Schiedeella diaphana
taxonomy: Schiedeella diaphana is a species of orchid. It is classified within the family Orchidaceae. The genus Schiedeella is a monotypic genus, containing only one known species. This species is native to Central and South America. It is an epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants for support.
